title: Constellation Brands to Present at the 2023 Consumer Analyst Group of New York Conference on Thursday, February 23, 2023
text: VICTOR, N.Y., Feb. 09, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Constellation Brands, Inc. (NYSE: STZ), a leading beverage alcohol company, announced today that Bill Newlands, President and Chief Executive Officer, will present at the 2023 Consumer Analyst Group of New York Conference on Thursday, February 23, 2023 in Boca Raton, FL. The presentation is scheduled to begin at 3:00 p.m. ET and is expected to cover the company's strategic business initiatives, financial metrics, and operating performance, as well as outlook for the future.
